# React + TypeScript + Vite Project

This workspace is a modern React application built with Vite and TypeScript for fast development and optimal performance.

## Project Stack
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Framework**: React
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server (currently running at http://localhost:5173)
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Project Setup Status
- [x] Project scaffolded with Vite (react-ts template)
- [x] React with TypeScript configured
- [x] Development server running (http://localhost:5173)
- [x] Production build tested and working
- [x] Dependencies installed (153 packages)
- [x] ESLint configured

## Quick Start
The development server is running. Access the application at `http://localhost:5173/`

## Important Files
- **src/App.tsx** - Main application component
- **src/main.tsx** - Application entry point
- **src/App.css** - Application styles
- **vite.config.ts** - Vite configuration
- **tsconfig.json** - TypeScript configuration
- **eslint.config.js** - ESLint configuration
- **index.html** - HTML entry point

## Project Structure
```
src/
  ├── App.tsx
  ├── App.css
  ├── main.tsx
  ├── vite.env.d.ts
  └── assets/
    ├── react.svg
    └── hero.png
public/
  └── vite.svg
dist/
  └── (production build output)
```
